name: std-board
description: std-board — generic N-column board primitive. `config.columns` is an array of column definitions ({ key, label, icon, variant }); the trait `array/map`s them on `BoardItemsLoaded` into `@entity.boards` where each board carries its filtered items + a count. The render is a `data-grid` over `@entity.boards` (one card per column) whose `renderItem` lambda nests a `data-list` over `@col.items` (the cards in that stage). N is config-driven — pass any number of columns; the outer `data-grid`'s `cols` is bound to `@config.gridCols` so the grid wraps if you exceed it. Topology = loading / viewing_board / viewing_card / adding / error — distinct from the cookie-cutter `loading/browsing/viewing_single/error` CRUD shape. App-level atoms (e.g. std-pipeline) compose std-board via `uses` and add a sibling persistor + extended source entity.

schema.name: std-board
schema.description: std-board — generic N-column board primitive. `config.columns` is an array of column definitions ({ key, label, icon, variant }); the trait `array/map`s them on `BoardItemsLoaded` into `@entity.boards` where each board carries its filtered items + a count. The render is a `data-grid` over `@entity.boards` (one card per column) whose `renderItem` lambda nests a `data-list` over `@col.items` (the cards in that stage). N is config-driven — pass any number of columns; the outer `data-grid`'s `cols` is bound to `@config.gridCols` so the grid wraps if you exceed it. Topology = loading / viewing_board / viewing_card / adding / error — distinct from the cookie-cutter `loading/browsing/viewing_single/error` CRUD shape. App-level atoms (e.g. std-pipeline) compose std-board via `uses` and add a sibling persistor + extended source entity.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The descriptive name of the board.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the board.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: The current status or lifecycle phase of the board.

fields.name: position
fields.description: The sequential order of this item within a collection.

emits.description: Indicates a card within the board has been selected.
Signals a card is being dismissed or closed.
Signals a new card is being added to the board.
Signals that a card's data has been successfully saved.
Signals a card has been repositioned within a column.
Signals a change in the order of cards within a column.
Signals removal of a card from the board.
Signals that board items have been successfully loaded.
Indicates a failure to load board items.
Signals that board items have been successfully saved.
Indicates a failure to save board items.

events.name: Board items loaded
events.description: Signals that board items have been successfully loaded.

events.name: Board items load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load board items.

events.name: Board items save failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to save board items.

events.name: Open Card
events.description: Indicates a card within the board has been selected.

events.name: Add Card
events.description: Signals a new card is being added to the board.

events.name: Move Card
events.description: Signals a card has been repositioned within a column.

events.name: Reorder Card
events.description: Signals a change in the order of cards within a column.

events.name: Reorder Position
events.description: Indicates a change in the order of items within a column.

events.name: Board items saved
events.description: Signals that board items have been successfully saved.

events.name: Close Card
events.description: Signals a card is being dismissed or closed.

events.name: Delete Card
events.description: Signals removal of a card from the board.

events.name: Save Card
events.description: Signals that a card's data has been successfully saved.

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after the board loads. Default is the canonical column data-grid with nested per-column data-lists. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (swim-lanes, timeline-roadmap, etc.) while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

cardIdBinding.label: Card id binding
cardIdBinding.description: Per-card binding for the id used in action payloads.

columns.label: Columns
columns.description: Board columns; each row's stage maps to a column key

cardStageBinding.label: Card stage binding
cardStageBinding.description: Per-card binding for the stage/status slot.

cardDescriptionBinding.label: Card description binding
cardDescriptionBinding.description: Per-card binding for the description slot.

formFields.label: New-card fields
formFields.description: Fields shown in the add-card form

gridCols.label: Grid columns
gridCols.description: Outer grid column count before the board wraps

groupByField.label: Group-by field
groupByField.description: Entity field whose value matches a column key — items are filtered into columns by it. Default 'stage'; set to 'status' (or any field) for entities that track state under a different name.

cardTitleBinding.label: Card title binding
cardTitleBinding.description: Per-card binding for the title slot.

title.label: Board title
title.description: Heading shown above the column board

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for cards rendered by this board.
